query:

  'regulations' as table_name, COUNT(*) as record_count FROM regulations
UNION ALL
SELECT 'esrs_datapoints', COUNT(*) FROM esrs_datapoints
UNION ALL

UNION ALL

UNION ALL
SELECT 'regulation_standard_mappings', COUNT(*) FROM regulation_standard_mappings
UNION ALL
SELECT 'hub_news', COUNT(*) FROM hub_news
UNION ALL
SELECT 'knowledge_embeddings', COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_embeddings;
